title: Distribute Supplies
description: The people are in need. Secure and distribute supplies to the less fortunate.

enemy.name: Greedy Capitalist
enemy.description: A capitalist hoarding resources for profit.

title: Restore Free Press
description: Local news outlets have been silenced. Re-establish the press's freedom to report!

enemy.name: Censorship Squad
enemy.description: Agents dedicated to suppressing the truth.

title: Take down communist banners
description: The old town is full of communist propaganda. Take it down!

title: Establish Order
description: Riots have broken out. Establish order by any means necessary.

enemy.name: Rebel Leader
enemy.description: The leader of the riot, challenging your authority.
